articles.summary: 将验证能力（判断解决方案正确性）作为提升大语言模型的新缩放轴，提出通用验证框架LLM-as-a-Verifier，提供细粒度的正确性判断，与预训练、后训练和测试时计算互补，拓展LLM性能提升途径。

While current world models approach this through two distinct paradigms: learning the dynamics over the 2D pixel space or more explicit 3D geometric s
articles.summary: 为应对机器人操作中可变形物体动力学预测的高维状态与复杂材料特性挑战，提出Deform360大规模多视角视觉触觉数据集，覆盖2D像素与3D几何两种世界模型范式，推动可变形物体建模与机器人操作研究。

articles.title: Multiplayer Interactive World Models with Representation Autoencoders
articles.excerpt: We introduce the first multiplayer world model for highly dynamic environments governed by complex physical interactions. Whereas single-player world models treat the other agents as part of the environment, ours conditions on the action streams of multiple agents, learning to attribute changes in the scene to the correct player and to stay coherent under arbitrary combinations of their actions. articles.summary: 提出首个多人世界模型，处理复杂物理交互下的高度动态环境。该模型以多个智能体动作流为条件，学习将场景变化归因到正确玩家，并在任意动作组合下保持一致性，突破单人世界模型将其他智能体视为环境部分的局限。

articles.title: Unified Audio Intelligence Without Regressing on Text Intelligence

In this work, we introduce Nemotron-Labs-Audex-30B-A3B (Audex), a unified audio-text LLM built on Nemotron-Cascade-2-30B-A3B, a strong text-only MoE LLM. Audex adopts a simple unified design with a single Transformer decoder: audio inputs are encoded and projected into the text embedding space, while
articles.summary: 提出Nemotron-Labs-Audex-30B-A3B（Audex），基于Nemotron-Cascade-2-30B-A3B MoE模型构建的统一音频-文本大语言模型。采用单一Transformer解码器，将音频编码并投影到文本嵌入空间，实现音频理解、推理与生成，同时保持文本任务性能。

articles.title: Qantara: Bridge-Flow Training for Multi-Paradigm JEPA Control
articles.excerpt: Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) underpin a growing family of latent world models for control from raw pixels, but every existing JEPA world model commits at training time to a single inference paradigm: either trajectory optimisation in a learned dynamics model, or direct behaviour cloning. A single checkpoint that serves both would defer this choice to inference, when deployment
articles.summary: 现有JEPA世界模型训练时只能选择单一推理范式（轨迹优化或行为克隆）。Qantara提出桥流训练方法，使单个检查点能在推理时延迟决策，同时支持两种范式，提升基于像素的潜在世界模型在控制任务中的灵活性与部署效率。

articles.title: Autonomous Information Seeking: A Roadmap for Agentic Recommender Systems

This survey provides a comprehensive overview of this emerging landscape by introducing a unified taxonomy grounded in the level of autonomy and three core paradigms of agentic recommend
articles.summary: 这篇综述梳理了基于大语言模型智能体的推荐系统从静态排序管道向自主交互系统的转变。提出以自主性级别为核心的统一分类法，涵盖三种核心范式，为开发能推理、规划与行动的智能推荐系统提供路线图。

articles.title: dOPSD: On-Policy Self-Distillation for Diffusion Language Models
articles.excerpt: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) generate text by iteratively denoising a masked sequence, offering a parallel alternative to autoregressive models, but eliciting strong reasoning through post-training remains difficult: supervised fine-tuning is off-policy and suffers from exposure bias, while reinforcement learning gives only sparse, sequence-level rewards and is hard to apply without tra
articles.summary: 扩散大语言模型在并行文本生成上有潜力，但后训练强化推理困难。dOPSD提出在策略自蒸馏方法，在去噪过程中提供密集的中间监督，克服了监督微调的暴露偏差和强化学习的稀疏奖励问题，有效提升dLLM的推理能力。

articles.title: ACE-Brain-0.5: A Unified Embodied Foundational Model for Physical Agentic AI
articles.excerpt: Embodied AI is moving from isolated perception or action modules toward physical agents that understand, plan under goals, act through robot bodies, monitor progress, and improve from experience. Existing systems address this loop only in parts: end-to-end policies generate actions but often lack spatial reasoning, planning, and execution assessment, while robot-agent systems orchestrate tools or
articles.summary: 针对具身AI从孤立模块向完整物理智能体演进的趋势，提出ACE-Brain-0.5统一基础模型。它整合了理解、规划与执行评估，弥补了端到端策略缺失空间推理和机器人智能体系统缺少执行监控的不足，为实体智能体提供闭环能力。

articles.title: Nemotron-Labs-3-Puzzle-75B-A9B: Compressing Hybrid MoE LLMs
articles.excerpt: We present Nemotron-Labs-3-Puzzle-75B-A9B, a compressed variant of Nemotron-3-Super optimized for interactive deployment. We designed the model to maximize server throughput under high user throughput constraints. In interactive serving workloads on a single 8xB200 node, Puzzle-75B-A9B achieves approximately 2x higher server throughput than Nemotron-3-Super at matched user throughput constraints.
articles.summary: 提出Nemotron-Labs-3-Puzzle-75B-A9B，是Nemotron-3-Super的压缩版本，针对交互式部署优化。在单台8xB200节点上，匹配用户吞吐约束下，该模型服务吞吐量约为原模型的2倍，为高并发场景下高效部署MoE大语言模型提供方案。

articles.title: Worldscape-MoE: A Unified Mixture-of-Experts World Model for Scalable Heterogeneous Action Control
articles.excerpt: World models are rapidly becoming a core infrastructure for embodied intelligence and interactive agents: they provide controllable simulators in which agents can perceive, act, forecast, and acquire scalable experience. Yet current video generation world models are still organized around isolated control interfaces, such as camera trajectories, robot actions, or hand-joint signals. This fragmenta
articles.summary: 针对现有视频生成世界模型控制接口碎片化的问题，提出Worldscape-MoE统一混合专家世界模型，支持相机轨迹、机器人动作、手部关节等多种异构控制信号。通过MoE架构实现可扩展的异构动作控制，为具身智能体提供统一可控仿真环境。

articles.title: Bridging Interleaved Multi-Modal Reasoning as a Unified Decision Process
articles.excerpt: Unified multi-modal models (UMMs) have shown promising interleaved text-image reasoning capabilities, yet effectively optimizing such multi-turn generation via reinforcement learning (RL) remains an open challenge. Existing approaches apply RL exclusively to text steps, relegating image generation to supervised surrogates, preventing policy gradients from propagating through the full interleaved t
articles.summary: 统一多模态模型在文本-图像交错推理上取得进展，但当前RL仅优化文本步骤，图像生成依赖监督代理。该工作将交错多模态生成建模为统一决策过程，使策略梯度能贯穿全流程，从而通过端到端RL优化多模态生成，提升推理一致性。

articles.title: Safety Testing LLM Agents at Scale: From Risk Discovery to Evidence-Grounded Verification
articles.excerpt: LLM agents increasingly perform autonomous actions through external tools, leading to complex and evolving safety risks. However, existing safety testing targets expert-designed safety violations, and the corresponding outcomes are evaluated by hard-coded rules, making them costly to extend as agents evolve. To this end, we present Vera, an end-to-end automated safety testing framework that instan
articles.summary: 针对LLM智能体自主执行工具带来的动态安全风险，现有测试依赖专家规则且扩展成本高。提出Vera，一个端到端自动化安全测试框架，从风险自动发现到基于证据的安全验证，支持智能体演化下的高效安全评估。

articles.title: MentalThink: Shaping Thoughts in Mental SVG World
articles.excerpt: We introduce MentalThink, a visual-symbolic reasoning paradigm that equips Multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) with an executable mechanism for "mental" visualization. The core of MentalThink is a think-with-SVG pipeline, where the model learns to generate, render, and interpret scalable vector graphics (SVG) code as an intermediate visual representation for multi-turn reasoning. By creating structured vector
articles.summary: 提出MentalThink视觉-符号推理范式，赋予多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）可执行的“心智”可视化机制。核心是think-with-SVG管道，模型学习生成、渲染和解释SVG代码作为中间视觉表示，用于多轮推理，通过结构化向量图促进空间逻辑思考。
